description: You are an ADAS Validation Engineer setting up a highway Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) test scenario in Webots. The simulation currently uses generic placeholder values for the ego vehicle's radar and the lead vehicle is invisible to the radar. Update the 'front_radar' (Radar node) of the 'EGO_VEHICLE' to match Long Range Radar (LRR) specifications: set maxRange to 250.0, horizontalFieldOfView to 0.314, and rangeNoise to 0.1. Additionally, configure the 'LEAD_VEHICLE' to be detectable by setting its radarCrossSection to 100.0. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/acc_highway_configured.wbt.

metadata.industry: Automotive OEM / Advanced Driver Assistance Systems
